items.title: 从结构化到多模态：Apache Flink，多模态数据处理的流式底座
items.summary: 过去很长一段时间里，数据处理系统主要围绕结构化记录展开：订单、日志、点击、交易、指标、维表、事实表。数据被抽象成一行行 schema 清晰的记录，核心任务是清洗、关联、聚合、统计。这类链路支撑了搜索、BI、风控、推荐、广告等大量传统业务，也塑造了我们对数据工程的默认想象：数据处理首先是对结构化字段的加工。...

items.title: 工信部提示 AI 编程工具 Claude Code 存在安全后门隐患
items.summary: 近日，工业和信息化部网络安全威胁和漏洞信息共享平台（NVDB）监测发现，AI编程工具Claude Code存在安全后门隐患，危害严重。 Claude Code是美国Anthropic公司开发的AI编程工具，可根据文字需求自主完成代码编写、修复等工作。由于其内置了监控机制，未经用户同意即可向远程服务器回传用户地域、身份标识等敏感信息，受影...

items.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
items.summary: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

items.title: Shut Those Laptops! Anthropic Puts Its Claude Cowork Agent on Your Phone
items.summary: Claude Cowork now keeps working on tasks even after you close your laptop. It’s part of a larger push toward smartphone-controlled agents.

items.title: These New Smart Glasses From Solos Come With a Privacy Shield for the Cameras
items.summary: You can clip a cover over the cameras, which could be a double-edged sword.

items.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
items.summary: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

items.title: The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale
items.summary: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow. That constant evolution also introduces risk, leaving IT leaders to wonder which investments

items.title: Erling Haaland Is Everywhere at the World Cup. Most of It Is AI
items.summary: Norwegian striker Erling Haaland isn’t just a footballer anymore. He’s become an internet character perpetuated by fans and AI.

items.title: British Space Startup Launches Longevity Lab Into Orbit
items.summary: The lab will beam back data to train AI models to predict how proteins behind age-related diseases like Alzheimer’s and certain cancers behave.

items.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
items.summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.

items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.
